sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 2.41 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.2)

statement.latex: Is the variety generated by \ ~a~finite associative ring; ~a~finite Lie ring; ~a~finite quasigroup finitely axiomatizable? What is the cardinality$n$of the smallest semigroup generating a non-finitely-axiomatizable variety? { A.\,I.\,Mal'cev} a) Yes (I.\,V.\,L'vov, Algebra and Logic, { 12} (1973), 156--167; \ R.\,L.\,Kruse, J.~Algebra, { 26} (1973), 298--318). b) Yes (Yu.\,A.\,Bakhturin, A.\,Yu.\,...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory VI_BRIDGING; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
